  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それは聖遺物です。",
      "それは絵画です。",
      "それは画家の両方の様式への知識の例です。",
      "それは壮大な壮大さに満ちた三次元の場面です。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは結び目のあるテキスタイルコードを持っています。",
      "それは中央の人物として王冠をかぶった聖母を持っています。",
      "それは伝統的な宗教的な香炉とろうそくを持っている二人の子供たちを持っています。",
      "それは三人の宗教的人物を持っています。",
      "それは聖母の前にひざまずく聖人を持っています。",
      "それはベッドの足元に空の棺を持っています。",
      "それは華やかな模様を持っています。",
      "それは鮮やかな色を持っています。",
      "それは贅沢な衣装を持っています。",
      "それは扉を覗く兵士を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは、聖母が天蓋の中で二度目に幼子イエスを抱いて天井に現れることを特徴としています。",
      "それは、オーラの中の三次元の雲の層を特徴としています。",
      "それは、画家の多次元環境を作成しようとする試みを示す、部屋の周りに広がるさまざまなオブジェクトを特徴としています。",
      "それは、絵画の向きがフランスとフランドルの版画に似た作品を描くことに対する画家の快適さを示していることを特徴としています。",
      "それは、画家のミハイル・ダマスキノスのタイル張りの床への知識を特徴としています。",
      "それは、死の床にある王冠をかぶった聖母を特徴としています。",
      "それは、使徒トマスが他の十人の使徒へのイエスの復活後の出現を見逃したことによって触発された伝説を特徴としています。",
      "それは、金色の豪華な装飾を特徴としています。",
      "それは、贅沢な衣装を着た兵士を特徴としています。",
      "それは、美しい青空の下で背景に現れる複数の構造物を特徴としています。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それは疑うトマスへの証拠として使われます。",
      "それは聖なるベルトを描写するために使われます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それはイタリア、トスカーナ州プラート大聖堂にあります。",
      "それはベナキ美術館に収蔵されています。"

IsA: It is an example of the artist's knowledge of both styles.
It is a three-dimensional scene filled with majestic splendor.
HasA: It has a knotted textile cord.
It has a crowned Virgin as the central figure.
It has two children holding a traditional religious thymiaterion and a candle.
It has three religious figures present.
It has a saint kneeling before the Virgin.
It has an empty casket at the foot of the bed.
It has exuberant patterns.
It has radiant colors.
It has ostentatious costumes.
It has a soldier peaking into a doorway.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the Virgin appearing a second time on the ceiling within a celestial aura holding the infant Jesus.
It is characterized by a three-dimensional layer of clouds in the aura.
It is characterized by different objects spread around the room demonstrating the artist's attempt to create a multi-dimensional environment.
It is characterized by the orientation of the painting illustrating the artist's comfort with painting works similar to French and Flemish engravings.
It is characterized by the artist's knowledge of Michael Damaskinos's tiled floors.
It is characterized by the crowned Virgin on her deathbed.
It is characterized by the legend inspired by doubting Thomas missing the post-Resurrection appearance of Jesus to the ten other apostles.
It is characterized by lavish ornamentation with gold.
It is characterized by a soldier dressed in lavish attire.
It is characterized by multiple structures emerging in the background beneath a beautiful blue sky.
UsedFor: It is used for proof to doubting Thomas.
It is used for depicting the holy belt.
LocatedIn: It is located at Prato Cathedral in Tuscany, Italy.
It is housed at the Benaki Museum.
CreatedBy: It was created by Theodore Poulakis.
CausedBy: It is caused by the legend of the Girdle of Thomas.
It is caused by Saint Thomas's doubt about the Assumption of Mary.
ConsistsOf: It consists of egg tempera on wood.
It consists of a knotted textile cord.
It consists of a crowned Virgin on her deathbed.
It consists of two children holding a thymiaterion and a candle.
It consists of three religious figures.
It consists of a saint kneeling before the Virgin.
It consists of an empty casket.
It consists of exuberant patterns.
It consists of radiant colors.
It consists of ostentatious costumes.
KnownFor: It is known for depicting the legend of the Girdle of Thomas.
It is known for its depiction of the Virgin Mary presenting the holy belt to Thomas.
It is known for its integration of Cretan Renaissance painting.
It is known for its resemblance to an engraving by Chrispijn van den Broeck.
It is known for its three-dimensional scene filled with majestic splendor.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the legend of the Girdle of Thomas.
It is associated with Saint Thomas the Apostle.
It is associated with the Assumption of Mary.
It is associated with Theodore Poulakis.
It is associated with the Heptanese School.
It is associated with Cretan Renaissance painting.
It is associated with French and Flemish engravings.
It is associated with Emmanuel Tzanes.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the time of the Assumption of Mary.
It occurred around the time of the Assumption of Mary.
About: It is about the legend of the Girdle of Thomas.
It is about Saint Thomas the Apostle's doubt.
It is about the Assumption of Mary.
It is about the Virgin Mary sending proof to Thomas.
It is about the presentation of the holy belt to Thomas.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by French and Flemish engravings.
It was influenced by Jan Sadeler I.
It was influenced by Chrispijn van den Broeck.
It was influenced by Étienne Delaune.
It was influenced by Michael Damaskinos.
It was influenced by Emmanuel Tzanes.
